title: ApsBase
description: Base schema for the Agent Policy Specification v0.1.0. All other APS schemas extend this schema. Defines shared types used across the specification.

Metadata.description: Common metadata attached to every APS context object.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent that owns this session.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the current session.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the interception occurred.

AssistantMessage.description: A message produced by the LLM (role must be 'assistant').

content.description: The text content of the assistant message.

Message.description: A single message in a conversation.

role.description: The role of the message author.

content.description: The text content of the message.
